description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-faceted hip roof and a symmetrical front facade. The exterior features numerous tall, rectangular windows arranged in even rows, with a prominent bay window section at the front. The house includes a double garage with a wide driveway and a covered front entryway supported by columns. The main entrance is centrally located and flanked by large windows, giving the house a balanced and formal appearance. The roof is steeply pitched and consists of several intersecting sections, adding architectural interest. The overall design suggests a blend of Colonial and modern suburban styles, with clean lines and a focus on symmetry.
description: A large, two-story suburban house with a complex hip roof, symmetrical window rows, a double garage, and a columned front entryway.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the bay window, tall windows, and part of the main entryway.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the plain back wall, fewer windows, and the side of the driveway.
description_view_2: Direct front view displaying the double garage, main entrance, symmetrical windows, and driveway.
description_view_3: Rear-right view showing the back porch area, columns, and additional windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, and supporting columns
